title: eriogonum chrysocephalum subsp. cusickii
intro: Eriogonum chrysocephalum subsp. cusickii, also known as Cusick's buckwheat, is a flowering plant species in the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cusick's buckwheat are attributed to its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune function. Eriogonum chrysocephalum subsp. cusickii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
